entities.name: GRAIN AMARANTH
entities.description: A C4 dicotyledonous pseudocereal distributed globally with an excellent nutritional profile and adaptability.

entities.name: AMARANTHUS HYPOCHONDRIACUS
entities.description: The scientific name for grain amaranth used in the genetic diversity study.

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL PROFILE
entities.description: The nutritional characteristics of grain amaranth.

entities.name: ADAPTABILITY
entities.description: The ability of grain amaranth to withstand a broad range of environmental factors.

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL FACTORS
entities.description: External conditions that grain amaranth adapts to.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variation of genetic characteristics among Amaranthus hypochondriacus accessions.

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE
entities.description: The distribution of genetic variation within and among the studied amaranth populations.

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE SSR MARKERS
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat markers developed in-house to assess genetic diversity and population structure.

entities.name: POLYMORPHISM INFORMATION CONTENT
entities.description: A metric used to indicate the level of polymorphism across amaranth accessions.

entities.name: POPULATION STRUCTURE ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analytical process used to identify genetic clusters in the amaranth accessions.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The significant level of genetic difference found in the germplasm.

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Future agricultural initiatives that can utilize the identified genetic variability.
